fields.Front: I am waiting for you outside
fields.Back: Gua lagi nunggu lo di luar

fields.Front: I have never been there
fields.Back: Gue belum pernah ke sana

fields.Front: Will you join us tonight?
fields.Back: Lo bakal ikut kita malam ini?

fields.Front: Have you already received that email?
fields.Back: Apakah Anda sudah menerima email itu?

fields.Front: What time will you all leave?
fields.Back: Kalian akan berangkat jam berapa?

fields.Front: She once taught at that university
fields.Back: Beliau pernah mengajar di universitas itu

fields.Front: We are not part of that team
fields.Back: Kami bukan bagian dari tim tersebut

fields.Front: I am no longer a student there
fields.Back: Aku bukan lagi mahasiswa di sana

fields.Front: They were not my close friends before
fields.Back: Mereka bukan teman dekatku dulu

fields.Front: This is not the first time I try
fields.Back: Ini bukan pertama kali aku mencoba

fields.Front: He is not the only option now
fields.Back: Dia bukan satu-satunya pilihan sekarang

fields.Front: That house is not my family's property
fields.Back: Rumah itu bukan milik keluargaku

fields.Front: She was not joking at that time
fields.Back: Dia bukan sedang bercanda saat itu

fields.Front: This is not something to be afraid of
fields.Back: Ini bukan sesuatu yang harus ditakuti

fields.Front: I live in a small apartment now
fields.Back: Aku tinggal di apartemen kecil sekarang

fields.Front: Do not drink that, that is poison
fields.Back: Jangan minum itu, itu racun

fields.Front: I only want to rest for a moment
fields.Back: Aku cuma ingin istirahat sebentar

fields.Front: This time is very valuable to me now
fields.Back: Waktu ini sangat berharga bagiku sekarang

fields.Front: I really appreciate your help earlier
fields.Back: Aku sangat menghargai bantuanmu tadi

fields.Front: She has not said the real reason
fields.Back: Dia belum mengatakan alasan sebenarnya

fields.Front: I often daydream during long trips
fields.Back: Aku sering melamun saat perjalanan panjang

fields.Front: What actually happened last night?
fields.Back: Apa yang sebenarnya terjadi tadi malam?

fields.Front: I cannot forbid him to leave
fields.Back: Aku tidak bisa larang dia pergi

fields.Front: Visitors are forbidden to enter after ten
fields.Back: Pengunjung dilarang masuk setelah jam sepuluh

fields.Front: This is the hardest part of that project
fields.Back: Ini bagian tersulit dari proyek itu

fields.Front: This is the most difficult task I have ever done
fields.Back: Ini tugas tersulit yang pernah aku kerjakan

fields.Front: He is the youngest member on this team
fields.Back: Dia adalah anggota termuda di tim ini

fields.Front: This is the easiest way to solve the problem
fields.Back: Ini cara termudah untuk menyelesaikan masalah

fields.Front: This question is not easy to understand
fields.Back: Soal ini tidak mudah untuk dipahami

fields.Front: He is still young but already successful
fields.Back: Dia masih muda tapi sudah sukses

fields.Front: I want to join, but I am not ready
fields.Back: Aku mau ikut, tapi aku belum siap

fields.Front: I have already tried, but the result is not clear yet
fields.Back: Aku sudah mencoba, tetapi hasilnya belum jelas

fields.Front: The teacher will test our ability tomorrow
fields.Back: Guru akan uji kemampuan kita besok

fields.Front: I have not marked that date on the calendar
fields.Back: Aku belum menandai tanggal itu di kalender

fields.Front: I have not been good at playing chess since before
fields.Back: Aku tidak pandai bermain catur sejak dulu

fields.Front: The meeting was canceled because of heavy rain
fields.Back: Rapat itu batal karena hujan deras

fields.Front: I do not allow them to enter tonight
fields.Back: Aku tidak izinkan mereka masuk malam ini

fields.Front: Refresh your mind before making a decision
fields.Back: Segarkan pikiranmu sebelum mengambil keputusan

fields.Front: We will go to the beach during the holiday
fields.Back: Kami akan pergi ke pantai saat hari libur

fields.Front: That thought has never left my mind
fields.Back: Pikiran itu tidak pernah hilang dariku

fields.Front: This tool becomes an energy saver at home
fields.Back: Alat ini menjadi penghemat energi di rumah

fields.Front: This battery no longer has power
fields.Back: Baterai ini tidak punya daya lagi

fields.Front: I am charging my phone battery now
fields.Back: Aku sedang mengisi baterai ponsel sekarang

fields.Front: That airplane will land in ten minutes
fields.Back: Pesawat itu akan mendarat dalam sepuluh menit

fields.Front: I have not filled up fuel since yesterday
fields.Back: Aku belum mengisi bensin sejak kemarin

fields.Front: I have gotten rid of dandruff since last month
fields.Back: Aku sudah menghilangkan ketombe sejak bulan lalu

fields.Front: That dandruff doesn't disappear even after washing hair
fields.Back: Ketombe itu tidak hilang walau sudah keramas

fields.Front: He did not buy that gold ring
fields.Back: Dia tidak membeli cincin emas itu

fields.Front: I will buy a ring for the proposal tomorrow
fields.Back: Aku akan membeli cincin untuk lamaran besok

fields.Front: This menu is specially made for new customers
fields.Back: Menu ini dibuat khusus untuk pelanggan baru

fields.Front: The plan will not change even if there are problems
fields.Back: Rencananya tidak akan berubah meski ada masalah

fields.Front: That old house will be renovated next year
fields.Back: Rumah tua itu akan direnovasi tahun depan

fields.Front: He doesn't feel old even though his hair turned white
fields.Back: Dia belum merasa tua meski rambutnya memutih

fields.Front: I will take care of that elderly person well
fields.Back: Aku akan merawat orang tua itu dengan baik

fields.Front: That building has been being renovated since early this year
fields.Back: Gedung itu sedang direnovasi sejak awal tahun

fields.Front: His hair has already turned gray since a young age
fields.Back: Rambutnya sudah memutih sejak usia muda

fields.Front: His age is not enough to take that exam
fields.Back: Usianya belum cukup untuk mengikuti ujian itu

fields.Front: Where does your family originally come from?
fields.Back: Kamu berasal dari mana asal keluargamu?

fields.Front: His business is not developing even though it has run long
fields.Back: Bisnisnya tidak berkembang meski sudah lama berjalan

fields.Front: That death has not been explained by the doctor
fields.Back: Kematian itu belum dijelaskan oleh dokter

fields.Front: Did he die before you arrived?
fields.Back: Apakah dia sudah meninggal sebelum kamu datang?

fields.Front: That plant died because it was not watered yesterday
fields.Back: Tanaman itu mati karena tidak disiram kemarin

fields.Front: That company will automate the production process next year
fields.Back: Perusahaan itu akan mengotomatiskan proses produksi tahun depan

fields.Front: That factory's production did not increase this month
fields.Back: Produksi pabrik itu tidak meningkat bulan ini

fields.Front: That factory will temporarily close because of renovation
fields.Back: Pabrik itu akan tutup sementara karena renovasi

fields.Front: We are temporarily staying at a relative's house nearby
fields.Back: Kami tinggal sementara di rumah saudara dekat sini

fields.Front: Why isn't this lamp on?
fields.Back: Kenapa lampu ini tidak menyala?

fields.Front: I will bring a flashlight later tonight
fields.Back: Aku akan membawa senter nanti malam

fields.Front: I haven't activated airplane mode yet
fields.Back: Mode pesawat belum aku aktifkan

fields.Front: Am I disturbing you right now?
fields.Back: Apakah aku mengganggu kamu sekarang?

fields.Front: That alarm hasn't rung this morning
fields.Back: Alarm itu belum berbunyi pagi ini

fields.Front: The doorbell is ringing loudly
fields.Back: Bel pintu sedang berbunyi keras

fields.Front: That alarm has already been set earlier
fields.Back: Alarm itu sudah disetel sejak tadi

fields.Front: I will set the alarm before sleeping
fields.Back: Aku akan setel alarm sebelum tidur

fields.Front: This light will turn off automatically later
fields.Back: Lampu ini akan mati otomatis nanti

fields.Front: The security system is being updated now
fields.Back: Sistem keamanan sedang diperbarui sekarang

fields.Front: When will you update this app?
fields.Back: Kapan kamu akan perbarui aplikasi ini?

fields.Front: That recorder is recording our voices
fields.Back: Perekam itu sedang merekam suara kita

fields.Front: I haven't used that camera today
fields.Back: Kamera itu belum aku pakai hari ini

fields.Front: Do you have access to this system?
fields.Back: Apakah kamu punya akses ke sistem ini?

fields.Front: I don't know the location of that place
fields.Back: Aku tidak tahu lokasi tempat itu

fields.Front: This light is too dim for reading
fields.Back: Cahaya ini terlalu redup untuk membaca

fields.Front: I will study more focused tonight
fields.Back: Aku akan belajar lebih fokus malam ini

fields.Front: My privacy must not be violated by you
fields.Back: Privasi aku tidak boleh kamu langgar

fields.Front: I will check that message later
fields.Back: Aku akan periksa pesan itu nanti

fields.Front: You may enter once you are ready
fields.Back: Kamu boleh masuk kalau sudah siap

fields.Front: I cannot open that file
fields.Back: Aku tidak bisa membuka file itu
